  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe creating and setting values in an unknown registry key 'HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider', which is not a standard Windows component. This behavior is often associated with malware persistence or configuration.",

    "reg_create",

    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider",
